rationale: A Goku/Kamehameha anime hook has zero connection to aquapark.io's core loop of sliding, steering, and bumping on water tracks — there's no plausible bridge from a power-up charge pose to racing gameplay, so playable intent collapses after the first 3 seconds. The shared blue/white palette is a coincidence rather than a brand fit, and using licensed-character likenesses (Goku) carries IP/takedown risk that outweighs the modest audience overlap with younger male players. Recommend skipping this archetype; if the team wants to borrow the "charging energy" curiosity beat, reskin it as an original character on a slide with a glowing speed boost rather than copying the anime reference.
